task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Mountain View Home in Boulder CO (Real Estate). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $2450000.00 and wholesale is $1960000.00. Product features: 4-bedroom contemporary home with floor-to-ceiling windows and Flatiron views. Reference: https://www.compass.com/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Mountain View Home in Boulder CO. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Mountain View Home in Boulder CO. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
